meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Mina Meeting Assistant
products.tagline: Your AI Teammate now responds and executes during your calls
products.summaryZh: 你的AI队友现在能在通话中响应并执行任务。
products.descriptionZh: Mina是一款AI会议助手，能主动参与会议、实时响应、从你的工具中提取上下文，并在对话进行时推动工作推进。与传统会议工具不同，Mina可在通话中发言、使用技能、生成输出，并在会议前后及进行中支持销售通话、面试、站会、客户对话及团队工作流程。
products.description: Mina is an AI meeting assistant that actively participates in meetings, responds in real time, pulls context from your tools, and helps move work forward while the conversation is still happening. Unlike traditional meeting tools, Mina can speak during calls, use skills, generate outputs, and support sales calls, interviews, standups, customer conversations, and team workflows before, during, and after meetings.

products.name: SocialEcho 2.0
products.tagline: AI social media copilot for teams and agents
products.summaryZh: AI社交媒体副驾，适用于团队与代理
products.descriptionZh: SocialEcho是一款面向跨品牌、跨账号、跨渠道管理社交营销活动的团队AI社交副驾。可查看热门趋势、创作共鸣内容、优化各平台帖子、从统一工作区发布、管理每场对话，并追踪驱动互动的关键因素。基于官方社交API构建，SocialEcho为OpenClaw、Hermes等AI代理及自定义自动化工具提供安全方式管理已关联的社交账号，无需依赖脆弱的爬取技术或存在风险的变通方案。
products.description: SocialEcho is an AI social media copilot for teams managing social campaigns across multiple brands, accounts, and channels. See what’s trending, create content that resonates, optimize posts for every platform, publish from one workspace, manage every conversation, and track what drives engagement. Built on official social APIs, SocialEcho gives AI agents like OpenClaw, Hermes, and custom automations a secure way to manage connected social accounts without brittle scraping or risky workarounds.

products.name: Databox MCP
products.tagline: Chat with your business data inside Claude, ChatGPT and more
products.summaryZh: 在Claude、ChatGPT等平台中与您的业务数据进行对话。
products.descriptionZh: Databox MCP 将您的业务数据连接到 Claude、ChatGPT、Cursor 和 n8n。您可以用日常语言询问收入、营销活动或销售管道，并获得基于真实指标和业务背景的答案。
products.description: Databox MCP connects your business data to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and n8n. Ask about revenue, campaigns, or pipeline in plain language and get answers grounded in your real metrics and business context.

products.name: Dune Keypad
products.tagline: Context-aware Mac keypad, w/ Claude + community extensions
products.summaryZh: 情境感知Mac键盘，支持Claude及社区扩展
products.descriptionZh: Dune 是一款为 Mac 打造的上下文感知键盘，如今能围绕你构建专属体验。只需与 Claude 对话即可创建快捷指令，浏览社区脚本市场，并将任意工作流分配至三个按键，覆盖你使用的各类应用。无论是会议、开发工具还是日常任务，Dune 都能即时适配，让正确操作始终触手可及。
products.description: Dune is a context-aware keypad for Mac that now builds around you. Create shortcuts just by talking to Claude, browse a Marketplace of community-built scripts, and assign any workflow to your three keys across the apps you use. From meetings to dev tools to everyday tasks, Dune adapts instantly so the right action is always one keypress away.

products.name: folk
products.tagline: the AI in your texts that gets stuff done
products.summaryZh: 你文本里的AI，帮你搞定事情。
products.descriptionZh: Folk 是存在于任何即时通讯应用中的 AI 好友：iMessage、Telegram、Discord 等。它能加入会议、帮你规划约会、知道你的位置，并在每次对话中变得更聪明。你使用得越久，它就越了解你。现在它支持多人协作，你和朋友可以组队，共同达成目标。
products.description: Folk is your AI friend that lives in any messaging app: iMessage, Telegram, Discord, and more. It joins meetings, plans your date, knows where you are, and gets smarter with every conversation. The longer you use it, the more it knows you. And now it's multiplayer, so you and your friends can team up and reach your goals together.

products.name: Typeahead
products.tagline: AI autocomplete for every app on your Mac
products.summaryZh: AI 自动补全，适用于 Mac 上的每一款应用
products.descriptionZh: Typeahead 是一款与你共同写作、而非代你写作的写作助手。它可在你 Mac 上的任意文本输入框中运行，在你输入时以内联建议的形式帮助你更快速、更智能地打字。它基于本地 AI 模型运行，支持离线使用，确保你的写作内容始终保留在设备上。
products.description: Typeahead is the writing assistant that writes with you, not for you. It works in every text field on your Mac, helping you type faster and smarter with inline suggestions that appear as you write. It runs on a local AI model, works offline and keeps your writing on your device.

products.name: Presentify
products.tagline: Take your presentation skills to the next level
products.summaryZh: 将你的演示技巧提升至新高度
products.descriptionZh: Presentify 是一款 macOS 应用，可用于标注屏幕、高亮光标、聚焦重要区域以及放大查看细节。它兼容 Keynote、Google Slides 和 Microsoft PowerPoint 等任何演示应用，也支持 Zoom、Microsoft Teams 和 Google Meet 等视频通话应用。
products.description: Presentify is a macOS app for annotating your screen, highlighting your cursor, spotlighting important areas, and zooming in for a closer look. It works with any presentation app, including Keynote, Google Slides, and Microsoft PowerPoint, as well as video calling apps like Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Google Meet.

products.name: Tabstack Web Research
products.tagline: Run a research agent with cited answers in a single API call
products.summaryZh: 通过单次API调用运行研究代理，获取带引用的答案。
products.descriptionZh: /research 通过一次 API 调用，为你的应用或智能体提供来自实时网络的带引用答案。不是预索引语料库，而是真实的实时网络。每次请求都会返回可验证的源 URL。源选择、综合和引用格式全部包含在调用中，你无需编写或维护任何相关代码。专为法律、金融和竞争情报场景设计，在这些场景中，错误答案意味着风险。免费试用。
products.description: /research gives your app or agent cited answers from the live web in one API call. Not a pre-indexed corpus: the actual live web. Every request comes back with source URL's users can verify. Source selection, synthesis, and citation formatting are all inside the call. You write or maintain none of that code. Built for legal, financial, and competitive intel, where a wrong answer is a liability. Free to try.

products.name: Trippple Club
products.tagline: Advertise together on Meta Ads and pay 3x less
products.summaryZh: 在Meta广告上联合投放，费用降低至三分之一
products.descriptionZh: Trippple Club 是首个面向小型企业的Meta广告联盟。您与共享受众且无竞争关系的同行合并预算，算法会将整个群体视为单一大型广告主。每位成员都能获得更优投放效果、更快学习速度及更低成本——且随着联盟规模扩大，这些优势会持续叠加。此外，我们还会为您制作广告！
products.description: Trippple Club is the first Meta ads collective for small businesses. You pool your budget with non-competing peers who share your audience. The algorithm treats the group like one large advertiser. Everyone gets better delivery, faster learning, and lower costs - and it compounds as the collective grows, besides, we create your ads too!

products.name: Open Caffeine
products.tagline: Keep your Mac awake
products.summaryZh: 保持 Mac 处于唤醒状态
products.descriptionZh: Open Caffeine 是一款原生 macOS 菜单栏应用，可在指定时长内保持 Mac 处于唤醒状态。支持选择预设、设置自定义计时器、切换屏幕休眠行为、使用全局快捷键、在菜单栏显示倒计时，并在电量低时自动停止。该应用开源、原生支持 Apple Silicon，专为需要简洁现代类 Caffeine 工具、且不想要多余营销菜单项的用户设计。
products.description: Open Caffeine is a native macOS menu bar app for keeping your Mac awake for a chosen duration. Pick presets, set a custom timer, toggle screen sleep behavior, use a global hotkey, show a countdown in the menu bar, and stop automatically at a low battery threshold. It is open source, Apple Silicon native, and built for people who want a simple, modern Caffeine-style utility without extra marketing menu items.

products.name: Mistral Vibe
products.tagline: I agent for long-running, multi-step work and coding
products.summaryZh: 我是用于长时间运行、多步骤工作和编码的智能体。
products.descriptionZh: 面向长周期生产力与编程的统一智能体，现已推出工作模式与代码模式。同时新增Vibe VS Code扩展。
products.description: The unified agent for long-horizon productivity and coding, launching with Work and Code modes. Plus, a new Vibe VS Code extension.

products.name: Tokenwise
products.tagline: A smart LLM proxy that shows where you're overpaying
products.summaryZh: 一个智能LLM代理，显示你多付了哪些费用
products.descriptionZh: Tokenwise 是一行式 LLM 代理（兼容 OpenAI 的 baseURL），专为独立开发者和小型团队设计。它能从你的真实请求中学习，精确显示你在哪些地方超支，并通过基于自身流量的质量检查（而非公开基准）加以验证，让你一键应用修复方案，同时实时确认节省的具体金额。
products.description: Tokenwise is a one-line LLM proxy (OpenAI-compatible baseURL) for makers and small teams. It learns from your real requests, shows exactly where you're overpaying, proven with quality checks on your own traffic, not public benchmark, and lets you apply the fix in one click while it verifies the savings in real dollars.

products.name: Stella
products.tagline: Local natural language search across all your files
products.summaryZh: 在所有文件中进行本地自然语言搜索
products.descriptionZh: 你知道文件存在，但Spotlight找不到。Stella可以。只需描述它，比如“我的期末考试小抄”、“上周会议的产品规格”，Stella就能找到。然后直接拖进Gmail、打开它，或从同一栏启动任何应用。一个快捷键掌控整个Mac。免费。私密。无需账户。文件名再乱也不怕。
products.description: You know the file exists. Spotlight can't find it. Stella can. Just describe it, "my cheat sheet for the final exam," "the product spec from last week's meeting" and Stella finds it. Then drag it straight into Gmail, open it, or launch any app from the same bar. One shortcut for your whole Mac. Free. Private. No account. Bad filenames welcome.

products.name: R0Y OMNI 1.0
products.tagline: Generate more accurate investment dashboards and reports
products.summaryZh: 生成更精准的投资仪表盘与报告
products.descriptionZh: 将自然语言提示转化为实时、功能完整的投资仪表盘，速度超越Bolt、Lovable等众多工具。全新Omni 1.0模型，性能优于已弃用的Atlas模型，可生成更出色的仪表盘。新增社区板块，可查看100多个预生成的仪表盘与模型。
products.description: Turning natural language prompts into live, fully functional investing dashboards, faster than Bolt, Lovable & many more. New Omni 1.0 model, outshines the deprecated Atlas model, and is able to generate far greater dashboards. Community section added, to view 100+ pre-generated dashboards & models

products.name: Paint By JSON | Figma API Client
products.tagline: Real API data in your mockups made as easy as lorem ipsum.
products.summaryZh: 在原型中使用真实API数据，像使用Lorem Ipsum一样简单。
products.descriptionZh: 一个将图层绑定到实时REST端点的Figma插件。粘贴URL，将JSON路径映射到图层名称，将配方保存为调色板，并应用到任意画框。用真实数据而非占位文本进行设计。
products.description: A Figma plugin that binds layers to live REST endpoints. Paste a URL, map JSON paths to layer names, save the recipe as a Palette, and apply it to any frame. Design with real data instead of lorem ipsum.

products.name: Emily by Co-Desk
products.tagline: Voice AI copilot for coworking & coliving operators
products.summaryZh: 面向联合办公与合住运营商的语音AI助手
products.descriptionZh: Emily 是 Co-Desk 内置的语音助手，目前处于公开测试阶段。她存在于你的手机中，并了解你的工作空间。你可以询问今日到访人员或逾期发票的情况，也可以让她为会员预订会议室。她会以卡片形式准备信息，你只需点击确认即可。语音提出建议，你确认操作，始终遵循两步流程。专为不常坐在办公桌前的运营人员设计：无论是带领参观、布置活动还是整理房间，当双手忙碌、手机在口袋中时，Emily 随时待命。
products.description: Emily is the voice assistant inside Co-Desk, now in public beta. She lives on your phone and knows your workspace. Ask about today's arrivals or overdue invoices. Tell her to book a room for a member. She prepares it as a card, you tap Confirm. Voice proposes, you confirm, always two steps. Built for operators who don't sit at a desk: walking a tour, setting up an event, turning over a room. Hands busy, phone in pocket, Emily ready.

products.name: NetworkSpy
products.tagline: HTTP(s) proxy debugger with custom viewer
products.summaryZh: HTTP(s) 代理调试器，支持自定义查看器
products.descriptionZh: 使用 NetworkSpy 检查、调试并理解现代 API 流量——这是一款专为 GraphQL、流式传输和 AI 应用构建的网络调试工具。在加入新项目、学习其他团队的系统或追踪棘手问题时，自定义查看器能让一切变得更简单。与其面对原始负载，不如与团队一起专注于真正的问题。不要在 AI 时代落后。借助合适的工具，更快构建、更智能调试，并交付更优质的产品。
products.description: Inspect, debug, and understand modern API traffic with NetworkSpy — a network debugger built for GraphQL, streaming, and AI apps. When joining new projects, learning other teams’ systems, or tracking tricky issues, a custom viewer makes everything easier. Instead of raw payloads, focus on real problems with your team. Don’t fall behind in the AI era. Build faster, debug smarter, and ship better products with the right tools.

products.name: Joanium
products.tagline: Local AI workspace to build and work with your computer
products.summaryZh: 本地AI工作空间，用于在电脑上构建和运行。
products.descriptionZh: Joanium 是一款本地优先的 AI 桌面应用，功能超越聊天。它能读取你的项目文件、按计划运行自动化任务、操作后台代理，并原生连接 GitHub、Gmail、Google Drive 和 Calendar，全程无需将数据发送至云端。支持 Gemini、Claude、GPT 等 10 余种 AI 提供商。你的数据始终保留在本地设备上。始终如此。
products.description: Joanium is a local-first AI desktop app that goes beyond chat. It reads your project files, runs automations on a schedule, operates background agents, and connects natively to GitHub, Gmail, Google Drive, and Calendar, all without sending your data to the cloud. Supports 10+ AI providers including Gemini, Claude, and GPT. Your data stays on your machine. Always.

products.name: Skylive
products.tagline: Never miss a celestial event, anywhere on Earth
products.summaryZh: 不错过任何天文事件，无论身处地球何处。
products.descriptionZh: SkyLive正在构建全球首个由社区驱动的天空摄像机网络。我们的使命是在全球部署摄像机，让人们无论天气、地点或时区如何，都能实时观看天体事件。通过结合实时流媒体、全球覆盖和事件追踪，SkyLive让天文学变得前所未有的触手可及。
products.description: SkyLive is creating the world's first community-powered network of sky cameras. Our mission is to deploy cameras across the globe, enabling people to watch celestial events live regardless of weather, location, or time zone. By combining real-time streaming, global coverage, and event tracking, SkyLive makes astronomy more accessible than ever before.

products.name: Sentinel
products.tagline: Control your robots from anywhere in the world
products.summaryZh: 在世界任何地方控制你的机器人
products.descriptionZh: Avea的Sentinel是市场上最快的远程遥操作软件，让您可以从世界任何地方控制机器人。借助Sentinel，机器人公司能够保持机器人100%的正常运行时间，并在自主系统出现故障时立即进行干预。
products.description: Avea's Sentinel is the fastest remote teleoperation software on the market, so you can control your robots from anywhere in the world. With Sentinel, robotics companies can keep their robots at 100% uptime and instantly intervene when autonomy breaks down.
